bird.name: Paria brushfinch
bird.summary: The Paria brushfinch (Arremon phygas) is a species of bird in the family Passerellidae, the New World sparrows. It is endemic to Venezuela.

locations.name: 委內瑞拉海岸山脈
locations.summary: 委內瑞拉海岸山脈（西班牙語：Cordillera de la Costa），又称委内瑞拉加勒比山系，是委内瑞拉的一个山脉系统，也是委内瑞拉八个自然区之一，沿委内瑞拉北部海岸的中部和东部延伸。该山脉是安第斯山脉的东北延伸，也被称为海上安第斯…

relations.subject: Paria brushfinch
relations.evidence: The Paria brushfinch is found in the northeastern section of the Venezuelan Coastal Ranges

relations.subject: Paria brushfinch
relations.evidence: It inhabits humid montane forest where it favors the interior undergrowth, though it also is sometimes at the forest edges
relations.object_summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。
